infrastructure::review_v2::scope_config_.docs: Loads review-scope.json into a v2 ReviewScopeConfig. After this track: reads the new optional `default_diff_ceiling_lines: Option<u32>` top-level field and per-group optional `diff_ceiling_lines: Option<u32>` from the JSON DTO, then passes both to `ReviewScopeConfig::new` as the `default_diff_ceiling` parameter and per-entry ceiling element. The public function signature is unchanged; the new ceiling data is extracted from the JSON DTO internally (D3 / IN-05 / CN-02).
